en: Tragically, this is based on your life. I mean, this is things...
ko: 슬프게도 이건 당신의 실제 이야기에서 따온 거잖아요. 실제로 있었던 일이에요.

en: No, but things like, isn't the washing machine, that happened to you. What?
ko: 아니, 하지만 세탁기 같은 건 실제로 당신한테 일어난 일이잖아. 뭐라고?

en: The washing. You were very hungover. Oh. Yeah.
All their stories are really cool, though, Graham.
ko: 근데 그레이엄, 그 이야기들 다 진짜 재밌긴 해.

en: When I was teaching, which is what this show is based on,
ko: 그레이엄, 내가 교사로 일할 때, 이 쇼가 바로 그때 이야기를 바탕으로 한 건데,

en: I went home one weekend and I was in my 30s.
ko: 어느 주말에 집에 갔었어. 그때 나는 30대였고.

en: I was probably 33 years of age.
I went home to see my mother and then I went back.
ko: 어머니를 만나러 집에 갔다가 다시 돌아왔어.

en: And while I was at home, my mother did my washing for me because I was only 33. And then I went back.
ko: 집에 있는 동안 어머니가 빨래를 해주셨어.

en: On the Sunday night, I got really drunk
and then I went for a curry.
And then the next day I went into school. I'm going to.
I went into school and it was a school in Slough and it was quite a rough school, but they had a really brilliant hearing impaired department.
So there were hearing impaired kids who, you know, struggled.
ko: 그래서 청각 장애가 있는 아이들이 있었는데, 좀 힘들어하는 애들이었어.
